inputs.label: Réaumur Temperature
inputs.businessContext: The temperature value measured in degrees Réaumur to be converted to Celsius.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the output result. Ensures compliance with reporting precision requirements.

inputs.label: Measurement Uncertainty (±)
inputs.businessContext: The estimated uncertainty of the Réaumur measurement, for quality assurance documentation.

inputs.label: Calibration Offset
inputs.businessContext: Optional offset to correct for systematic error in the measurement device, as per calibration certificate.

formulas.celsius: Math.round(((reaumur + calibrationOffset) * 1.25) * Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)
